allow: Bash(node -e "const wp=require\('./netlify/functions/node_modules/web-push'\); const k=wp.generateVAPIDKeys\(\); const crypto=require\('crypto'\); const secret=crypto.randomBytes\(32\).toString\('hex'\); console.log\('VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY='+k.publicKey\); console.log\('VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY='+k.privateKey\); console.log\('NOTIFY_SECRET='+secret\);")
